title: Dense Tender British Danmuji Toast
description: A pungent yet tender breakfast dish featuring danmuji, toast, and keto-friendly ingredients. Perfect for meal prep.

ingredients.name: Danmuji (Korean Kimchi)
ingredients.notes: Use a store-bought or homemade version

ingredients.name: Scottish Breakfast Toast
ingredients.notes: Look for a low-carb or gluten-free option

instructions: Toast the Scottish Breakfast Toast until crispy and golden brown.
In a small pan, melt the unsalted butter over medium heat.
Add the danmuji slices and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until tender and slightly caramelized.
Meanwhile, chop the fresh chives and set aside for garnish.
Once the danmuji is cooked, place a slice on each piece of toast.
Top each slice with a spoonful of melted butter, then sprinkle with chopped chives.
For meal prep, toast and store the slices in an airtight container for up to 3 days. Cook the danmuji and assemble just before serving.
